flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Delta College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.1k → $7.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Delta College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Delta College rose 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $11.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Delta College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).
